script.text: No live capacity signal is configured, so I can't confirm a spike — enable monitoring.
The capacity peaked at 96% with 42 minutes of throttling, driven by concurrent 06:00 refreshes in the Finance workspace.

messages.content: which specific operations caused the most recent spike?

script.text: The costliest individual operation was a QueryEnd on the Finance dataset consuming 30.0 CU-seconds, making it the single largest spike event in the estate.
